It's his final show. A big day, so to say. Of course, everyone showed up! With such a occasion, missing out on this grand finale would be heartbreaking. Everyone's favorite magician being seen for the last time.
Or atleast, this was what it was being seen as. So what happens once everyone in the audience is killed off and you're the last man standing?
Does he like you? Or maybe you were just lucky.
